item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly brakes the requested N+1 local patch, explicitly frames this as a fourth same-class review-point workaround after three prior similar fixes, and refuses adding another review point as the default. It redirects upstream to repeated failure evidence and problem definition, then proposes subtraction/consolidation/replacement via upstream rules, templates, automation, responsibility clarification, and exit conditions. No fail signal of simply adding another review/approval/local interception step is observed."}
